title: Audit small closures: task-JSON schema check + memory-setup skim
description: Two S-sized closures from source-mining-audit-2026-07-14.md section C: (1) structural schema check for tasks/TASK-NNN.json (command-center-later item; promote_task.py validates 8 HPOM fields but nothing validates structure/types of task JSON) — append to validate_task_mirrors.py or standalone, agent's call, wired into run_tests.sh with focused tests; (2) 10-minute skim of repo/claude-code-memory-setup-main (the only repo/ item no prior audit covered) to confirm nil marginal value, recorded as a short section appended to the source-mining audit artifact so the coverage claim becomes complete.
acceptance_criteria: Task-JSON structural validation (required keys, types, status vocabulary, output_paths/criteria list shapes) runs in the suite and fails on a malformed fixture.
Existing 190+ task files all pass the new check, or failures are triaged as real drift with repairs filed.
memory-setup skim conclusion appended to the audit artifact with evidence (file paths inspected).
